title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 5
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two students arranging to meet at school.
items.audio_script: Girl: Are we still meeting by the library entrance for the study session? I wrote it down yesterday, but I cannot find the message now. || Boy: That was the original plan, but the library is being used for an examination. [1]We need to meet outside the science room instead[/1]. || Girl: Thanks for telling me. I would have gone to the wrong place and wondered where everyone was. || Boy: No problem. I will arrive ten minutes early, so look for me near the entrance. Keep your phone on in case anything changes again.
items.question: Where should they meet?
items.explanation: They should meet outside the science room.

items.context: You hear two students discussing an art project.
items.audio_script: Boy: Are you ready for the art project yet? I put paint brushes in my bag because I thought that was what we needed. || Girl: That was on the first list, but the teacher is providing paints and brushes for everyone. [2]Everyone needs to bring a bottle of glue now[/2]. || Boy: Good thing I asked. I was about to leave my bag by the door and forget about it. || Girl: You still have time. Put it in now, and check the final message once more before we leave tomorrow morning.
items.question: What should the student bring?
items.explanation: The student needs to bring glue.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about the weekend.
items.audio_script: Girl: Are we still playing tennis on Sunday afternoon? I told my sister I would be home later, so I need to know. || Boy: That was the idea, but the courts are closed while they repair the surface. [3]We are going to visit the new exhibition instead[/3]. || Girl: That actually sounds better. I nearly paid for the other activity online this morning. || Boy: It is a good thing you had not booked anything yet. I will book our places this evening and send you the time. We can meet at the bus stop after lunch.
items.question: What will they do on Sunday?

items.context: You hear two people planning to see a film.
items.audio_script: Woman: I need to write down the time for the film. Is it still at half past six, like you said yesterday? || Man: No, the earlier performance has completely sold out. [4]It starts at quarter to seven now[/4], although we should arrive ten minutes earlier. || Woman: That is useful to know. I would have been waiting there at the wrong time. || Man: I will send you a reminder later. Bring everything you need, because there will not be time to go home again before it begins.
items.question: What time does the film start?
items.explanation: The film starts at quarter to seven.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about headphones.
items.audio_script: Boy: How are you getting on with your headphones? I heard it was not working properly. || Girl: I first thought the cable was damaged, and my brother wondered if one side was too quiet. But he checked it carefully last night. [5]They will not connect to my phone any more[/5]. || Boy: Can it be fixed before the journey tomorrow? || Girl: Yes, probably. We know what is wrong now, and the repair shop said it should be ready tomorrow afternoon. That is a relief because I need it this weekend.
items.question: What is wrong with the headphones?

options.B: They will not connect to the phone

items.explanation: The headphones will not connect to the phone.

items.context: You hear two friends arranging a journey to college.
items.audio_script: Man: Are you still travelling to college by train? I could meet you when you arrive. || Woman: I planned to, but the morning train has been cancelled. I considered going by taxi, but it would be far too expensive every day. [6]I am going by bus instead[/6]. || Man: Good idea. What time will you get there? || Woman: Just before eleven, if everything is on time. I have already checked the timetable online, so it should be easy. I will message you when I leave, so you do not have to wait outside.
items.question: How will the speaker get to college?
items.explanation: The speaker decides to take the bus.

items.context: You hear two family members choosing something for a bedroom.
items.audio_script: Girl: Did you buy a desk lamp for your bedroom? I saw one in the shop window yesterday and thought it looked nice. || Boy: No. I looked at a desk lamp, and I nearly chose a bedside table, but the room is too bright in the early morning. [7]I bought some curtains in the end[/7]. || Girl: Good choice. It sounds more useful, and I think it will be appreciated. || Boy: I hope so. I kept the receipt, just in case it needs changing after we give it.
items.question: What did the speaker buy?
